change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value: A0.1 - Start-up/inception workshop(Activity 1.1) Development of standardised training curricula and delivery of targeted training to journalists(Activity 1.2) Support to FNJ and selected media houses to review and develop internal organisational policies strengthening(Activity 1.3) Regional Symposium on press freedom and media professionalism(Activity 1.4) Reinvigoration through visibility products to reinforce FoE, media professionalism and human rights principles(Activity 1.5) Training for media and HRDs on media rights violations, reporting and documentation(Activity 1.6) Support to FNJ for operationalise Freedom of Expression and monitoring desk(Activity 1.7) Joint Monitoring Missions to assess press freedom, media security and media professionalism(Activity 1.8) Sensitisation on FoE for communities to report to media(Activity 1.9) Regular strategic interactions with local editors and publishers on media issues and policies (GESI and FoE)(Activity 2.1) Formation/strengthening of Free Media Networks(Activity 2.2) Interactive Workshops on targeted advocacy strategy/messaging and Human Rights(Activity 2.3) Seed grant support to Joint Action Plans to address identified challenges of press freedom, media security and professionalism(Activity 2.4) Analysis of media policy and laws(Activity 2.5) Empowerment of Provincial and Local Representatives on RTI, FoE and HR(Activity 2.6) targeted evidence-based Advocacy Dialogues to promote FoE, media professionalism and securityActivity 2.7. Production and broadcast of media programmes to promote media dialogues and awareness

snapshot.implementing_agency: European Bank for Reconstruction and Development

en.full: Promoting safe, professional, independent and accountable media for the promotion of human rights, democracy and peace in Nepal

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
